goal: Realign the web UI overview and persistent navigation toward a product/operator dashboard while preserving command and runtime guardrails.
scope: route preservation for deferred setup/select/import screens
static tests for hierarchy and guardrails

changes.result: sidebar now exposes only overview, accounts, diagnostics and settings
system state, mode, KPI row and events now precede the last-action evidence panel
launch client remains the only primary overview CTA; other overview header actions are ghost buttons and mode-card actions are secondary tiles
dominant overview copy now uses operator-facing language while compact guardrail copy remains available
added static assertions for nav membership, one primary overview CTA, secondary action treatment, action panel order and deferred route inertness

canon_alignment.evidence: overview boundary copy says factual state is confirmed by command responses; action evidence remains secondary

canon_alignment.rule: browser sends ui_action plus structured payload only
canon_alignment.evidence: no payload or command id changes; tests still assert no command_id/raw argv pattern

canon_alignment.rule: deferred setup/import cannot accept browser paths
canon_alignment.evidence: setup/select/import remain inert sections with no data-ui-action, live-action, file inputs or path payload controls

canon_alignment.rule: no runtime or adapter work in UI hierarchy contour
canon_alignment.evidence: changed files are limited to web UI HTML/CSS/JS, tests and contour artifacts

residual_risks: Accounts, Diagnostics and Settings still need their own follow-up hierarchy realignment contours.
Some technical tokens remain in secondary evidence and deferred screens to preserve exact safety meaning.
Browser smoke checks DOM order and key hierarchy, not pixel parity.
